XOnlineStorageUpload

Uploads a file attachment to accompany player statistics written by the XOnlineStatWrite function. 

HRESULT XOnlineStorageUpload(
    HANDLE hServerFileReference,
    LPCSTR szDirectory,
    DWORD dwUploadFlags,
    HANDLE hWorkEvent,
    PXONLINETASK_HANDLE phTask
);

Parameters

hServerFileReference
[in] Handle to a remote file reference. Obtain this handle by calling the XOnlineStatWriteGetResult function.
szDirectory
[in] Pointer to a null-terminated string that contains the directory path on the Xbox console to the files to upload.
dwUploadFlags
[in] Flags that qualify the upload process. The title should specify zero for this parameter.
hWorkEvent
[in, optional] Handle to an event that is signaled when there is work to do on the asynchronous task returned by the phTask parameter. This parameter can be NULL if such synchronization is not required.
phTask
[out] Pointer to a variable of type XONLINETASK_HANDLE that receives a task handle. Use this handle in calls to XOnlineTaskContinue to process the file upload.

Return Values

If XOnlineStorageUpload succeeds, the return value is S_OK.

If XOnlineStorageUpload fails, the return value is one of the following error codes:

Value Description
XONLINE_E_STORAGE_INVALID_REQUEST The request is invalid.
XONLINE_E_STORAGE_ACCESS_DENIED The client doesn't have sufficient permissions to upload the file.
XONLINE_E_STORAGE_FILE_IS_TOO_BIG The uploaded file is too large.
XONLINE_E_STORAGE_FILE_NOT_FOUND The file to upload was not found.
XONLINE_E_STORAGE_INVALID_ACCESS_TOKEN The access token signature is invalid.
XONLINE_E_STORAGE_CANNOT_FIND_PATH Name resolution failed.
XONLINE_E_STORAGE_FILE_IS_ELSEWHERE The client received a redirection request.
Other See Online Errors for information about other possible errors.

Remarks

The XOnlineStorageUpload function packages the files in the specified directory into a monolithic attachment, signs the attachment, contacts the storage service, and performs the upload.

You must specify XONLINE_STORAGE_SERVICE when calling XOnlineLogon in order to use the XOnlineStorageUpload and XOnlineStorageDownload functions.

Uploading empty attachments is not supported and will result in an error.

Only one upload operation at a time is supported.

Requirements

Header: Declared in Xonline.h.

Import Library: Use Xonline.lib.

See Also

Xbox Live Functions | Game Clips | XOnlineStatWrite, XOnlineStorageDownload, XOnlineStorageGetProgress
